seo.title_value: ProposalAI — Propostas comerciais com inteligencia artificial

og_tags.og:title: ProposalAI — Crie propostas comerciais com IA
og_tags.og:description: Gere propostas comerciais completas em minutos. Preencha os dados, a IA monta o texto, voce ajusta e exporta. Feito para freelancers, profissionais e agencias.

heading_hierarchy_details: Login page has two h1 tags (brand panel h1 + mobile h1) — should keep only one h1 per page
Register page has the same dual-h1 issue
Sidebar has an h1 (ProposalAI) which conflicts with per-page h1 headings — sidebar brand should be a div/span or aria-label, not h1
Proposals list, new proposal, proposal detail, and routines pages each have a proper single h1 — correct
EmptyState uses h3 without preceding h2 in some contexts (heading skip)
semantic_html_details: Forms use <form> elements with proper onSubmit — correct
seo.structured_data: MISSING — no JSON-LD schema markup (SoftwareApplication or WebApplication)
seo.robots_txt: NOT_CHECKED — app-level, not in frontend source

performance.estimated_lcp_rationale: Landing page is a lightweight spinner redirect. Auth pages render static forms with minimal JS. All pages are client-rendered but with small component trees. Fonts use display:swap preventing render-block.
performance.estimated_cls_rationale: Fonts use display:swap with next/font (automatic size-adjust). No images without dimensions. Skeleton loaders reserve layout space. No dynamic ad/banner injection.
performance.estimated_inp_rationale: Interactions are simple form submissions and navigation. No heavy computation on click handlers. jsPDF is dynamically imported only on export click.
bundle_concerns: framer-motion pinned to 'latest' — typically 30-50KB gzipped; large for the current usage (only animations, no layout animations visible). CSS animations already handle most motion. Consider removing if only used for simple transitions.
jspdf pinned to 'latest' — ~300KB gzipped but dynamically imported on demand (good pattern in proposals/[id]/page.tsx)
All dependencies use 'latest' version — production risk; pin exact versions for reproducible builds

css_analysis.approach: Tailwind CSS v4 with @import 'tailwindcss' — tree-shakes unused styles
css_analysis.custom_css: ~195 lines of globals.css (animations, glass utilities, scrollbar) — acceptable size
css_analysis.backdrop_filter: Used on glass/glass-card utilities — may cause GPU compositing on low-end devices but acceptable

rendering_strategy.critical_issue: ALL pages are 'use client' — no SSR/SSG content for search engines
rendering_strategy.impact: Google may not index page content properly. The landing page (/) is a blank spinner that redirects via JS. Crawlers see an empty div.

recommendations.issue: Landing page (/) renders empty spinner, no crawlable content
recommendations.fix: Add a proper landing/marketing page with SSR content, or implement middleware-based redirect so crawlers see meaningful content. Currently Google indexes an empty div with a spinner.

recommendations.issue: Missing og:image meta tag — link previews on social media show no image
recommendations.fix: Add og:image to layout.tsx metadata with a branded social card image (1200x630px recommended). Also add og:url and twitter:card meta tags.

recommendations.issue: Multiple h1 tags on login/register pages (brand panel + mobile view)
recommendations.fix: Change the sidebar/brand panel 'ProposalAI' from h1 to a div or span with appropriate styling. Keep only the page-specific h1. Sidebar brand should also be a div, not h1.

recommendations.issue: Sidebar uses h1 for brand name, conflicting with per-page h1 headings
recommendations.fix: Replace <h1> in Sidebar component with <div> or <span> styled identically. The brand name is decorative navigation, not the page's primary heading.
Add twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image to layout.tsx metadata object using the twitter property.
Add SoftwareApplication or WebApplication JSON-LD schema to layout.tsx for rich search results. Include name, description, applicationCategory, offers.

recommendations.issue: framer-motion adds ~30-50KB gzipped to bundle — current animations could use CSS only
recommendations.fix: Evaluate if framer-motion is needed. Current visible animations (fade-in, shimmer, toast, spin) are all CSS-based in globals.css. If framer-motion is only used for simple opacity/transform transitions, replace with CSS and remove the dependency.

recommendations.issue: All dependencies use 'latest' tag instead of pinned versions
recommendations.fix: Run 'npm ls' and pin all dependencies to exact versions in package.json for reproducible builds and to avoid unexpected breaking changes.

recommendations.issue: SVG icons inline in components lack aria-hidden attribute
recommendations.fix: Add aria-hidden='true' to decorative SVG icons (nav icons, button icons, empty state icon) so screen readers skip them. Icons that are the sole content of a button already have aria-label on the button (e.g., logout) — those are fine.

recommendations.issue: EmptyState uses h3 heading which may skip h2 in some page contexts
recommendations.fix: Make the heading level configurable via prop (default h2) or use a generic element with aria-level.

strengths: FormField uses htmlFor + id linking with useId() — proper label association
FormField uses aria-describedby for error/helper text and aria-invalid for error state
Error messages use role='alert' for live region announcement
Logout button has aria-label='Sair' and title
Mobile hamburger button has dynamic aria-label (Abrir/Fechar menu)
Button component properly disables during loading state
Color contrast appears adequate (dark foreground on warm light background)
issues: Decorative SVG icons (nav items, button icons, empty state) missing aria-hidden='true' — screen readers may announce path data
Mobile menu overlay lacks focus trap — keyboard users can tab behind the overlay
No skip-to-content link at the top of the page
ConfirmDialog should trap focus and return focus to trigger on close
Login/Register brand panel SVG pattern lacks aria-hidden='true'
